__fixture__.name: seed_failure_drill_locked_keychain
__fixture__.scenario: M1 credential-state seed failure drill: lock or remove the credential store and confirm the row surfaces unavailable state without pretending the account is usable. The OS keychain locks while the managed provider-session alias is staged. The seed row flips to `state_class = locked`, the unavailable reason is `store_locked`, the recovery action is `resume_after_credential_store_unlock`, and the saved alias survives so the unlock prompt can resolve the same handle. The seed contract forbids a silent plaintext-file fallback.

storage.storage_note: OS keychain holds the managed provider-session alias but is currently locked. The broker cannot resolve the handle until the platform unlock path completes.

recovery_copy_label: OS keychain is locked. Unlock the store to resolve the saved credential. Local work keeps saving to this device.
